title: YTPMV: Kirby Challenges Yusei Fudo to a Children's Card Game Whilst Crusin' on a Motorbike
description:
EDIT: NOW THISH IS DUBBED A YTPMV

Near the end, there are some missing bits and pieces. Oh well. 

To think making 5D's videos started with Trudge's infamous saying, "BLAH BLAH BLAAAAAAAAAAAHHH".

Amazing that this video is made only with WMM.
